title: Build Project Timelines with Confidence
description:
Build Project Timelines with Confidence is a hands-on course for anyone new to project management who needs to create clear, effective schedules. In any project, a simple list of tasks and deadlines often leads to chaos, missed handoffs, and team frustration. This course teaches you the foundational skill to prevent that: building a dependency-driven timeline that tells the logical story of your project.

You will learn to move beyond static to-do lists and use scheduling software to input tasks, link them with correct dependencies, and establish a realistic sequence of work. Through practical, follow-along labs, you will transform a raw task list into a professional Gantt chart. You will learn to format your chart for clarity, highlight key milestones, and export it as a shareable PDF that any stakeholder can understand. You will leave this course with the ability to build and communicate a reliable project plan, bringing confidence and clarity to your team. This foundational course is an excellent first step for aspiring project managers. To continue building your expertise, we recommend enrolling in a comprehensive program like the Google Project Management: Professional Certificate to master the full spectrum of project management skills.
